channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: South Korea invests US$166 million in chip startup Rebellions
item.description: South Korea has approved a KRW250 billion (approx. US$166 million) investment in local artificial intelligence (AI) chip startup Rebellions, as part of a government push to build a globally competitive AI chipmaker. [Intel]

item.title: Space data center startup Starcloud raises $170M at $1.1B valuation
item.description: Starcloud Inc., a startup that hopes to build a 5-gigawatt artificial intelligence data center in orbit, has closed a $170 million funding round. The company raised the capital in two tranches. Benchmark led the first transaction and co-led the second with EQ… [Intel]

item.title: Canada's 10 Rising AI Companies in 2026: From Enterprise LLMs to Video Generation Powering the Next Tech Boom
item.description: TORONTO — As global artificial intelligence investment surges, Canada's ecosystem continues to produce high-impact startups and scale-ups that attract major funding and talent, positioning the country as a key player in the 2026 AI landscape. [Intel]
